title: DAY 15 — CRM-M10 — EMAIL HANDLING / FRESHDESK (DAY 2 OF 2) + CRM-M14 — SHIPROCKET OPERATIONS & WEB TRACKER ESCALATIONS

questions.question: What is the correct daily priority order when reviewing the Shiprocket dashboard at start of day?

options.text: New Orders → Ready to Ship → NDR → Overdue Orders
NDR → Overdue Orders → New Orders → Ready to Ship
Overdue Orders → NDR → New Orders → Ready to Ship
Ready to Ship → New Orders → Overdue Orders → NDR

questions.question: A customer received an empty parcel. According to the escalation routing matrix, what is the primary escalation channel for "Wrong / Empty Shipments"?

options.text: Gmail to Shiprocket Executives
Shiprocket Platform Ticket (Create Ticket via Order)
FIMS Support Ticket
Shiprocket WhatsApp Group

questions.question: A courier failed to collect a shipment from the warehouse. What are the TWO escalation channels for "Pickup Issue" per the routing matrix?

options.text: FIMS Support Ticket + Shiprocket Platform Ticket
Gmail to Shiprocket Executives + Shiprocket WhatsApp Group (urgent)
Shiprocket Platform Ticket + Gmail to Shiprocket Executives
Shiprocket Chat + Gmail to Shiprocket Executives

questions.question: For an NDR issue, what is the first escalation channel per the routing matrix — before any Gmail is sent?

options.text: Shiprocket Platform Ticket
Shiprocket WhatsApp Group
FIMS action first (check order, update, reattempt)
Gmail to Shiprocket Executives

questions.question: What is the correct 5-level escalation sequence for mail-type Shiprocket issues?

options.text: Platform Ticket → Gmail → Follow-up Gmail → WhatsApp Group → Shiprocket Chat
Gmail → Follow-up Gmail → 2nd Follow-up Gmail → Shiprocket Chat → Platform Ticket
Gmail → Platform Ticket → Follow-up Gmail → Shiprocket Chat → WhatsApp Group
WhatsApp Group → Gmail → Follow-up Gmail → Platform Ticket → Shiprocket Chat

questions.question: After sending the 1st level Gmail escalation, how long must the executive wait before sending a 2nd level follow-up?

options.text: 24 hours
48 hours — no response or resolution within this window triggers the next level
72 hours
Same day — if no immediate reply, escalate again

questions.question: When sending a 2nd or 3rd level follow-up email, what is the critical rule about the email thread?

options.text: Create a new email with a fresh subject line for each follow-up
Reply on the same Gmail thread — do not create a new email; thread continuity is required
Forward the original email to a different Shiprocket contact
CC the CRM Manager on a new thread for visibility

questions.question: Who must be CC'd on every Shiprocket escalation Gmail?

options.text: CRM Asst Manager + CRM Manager
Shiprocket Mail ID + Style Feathers Mail ID
Ishan Sir + after-sale-services Slack (via email)
The customer + Shiprocket Executives

questions.question: An executive has a pickup issue that needs urgent escalation. They want to raise a Shiprocket Platform Ticket directly without sending any Gmail first. Is this correct?

options.text: Yes — platform tickets are the primary channel for all issue types
No — the rule states: always escalate via Gmail before platform ticket for mail-appropriate issue types; do not skip the sequence
Yes — pickup issues should go directly to platform ticket
No — pickup issues should go directly to the WhatsApp Group only

questions.question: When raising a Shiprocket Platform Ticket, what must be done after clicking Submit?

options.text: Close the ticket and wait for Shiprocket to reopen it if needed
Note the ticket number and take daily follow-up on the ticket status; update the Web Tracker Sheet immediately
Send a confirmation email to the customer with the ticket number
Escalate to CRM Asst Manager to track the ticket

meta.criteria: Platform Ticket, NDR Handling & Claim Filing

questions.question: An NDR shows the reason "Wrong address." What is the correct action sequence?

options.text: Process RTO immediately — wrong address orders cannot be redelivered
Call customer → get correct address → update in Shiprocket panel → reattempt delivery
Send a Gmail to Shiprocket Executives requesting address correction
Cancel the order in FIMS and inform the customer

meta.criteria: Platform Ticket, NDR Handling & Claim Filing

questions.question: Why must NDRs be actioned within 24 hours?

options.text: Shiprocket charges a late-action fee after 24 hours
The customer's refund window expires after 24 hours
Delay beyond 24 hours triggers automatic RTO — the shipment is returned to origin
Shiprocket de-prioritises the shipment after 24 hours

meta.criteria: Platform Ticket, NDR Handling & Claim Filing

questions.question: A claim filed for a lost shipment is approved by Shiprocket. What happens next?

options.text: Shiprocket directly refunds the customer via their original payment method
Shiprocket provides the claim amount to the Style Feathers Shiprocket wallet; CRM must then initiate a refund to the customer
The claim amount is deducted from future Shiprocket invoices — no customer refund needed
Shiprocket ships a replacement product directly to the customer

meta.criteria: Platform Ticket, NDR Handling & Claim Filing

questions.question: What are the 4 valid status values for the Web Tracker Sheet, and what does "Re-Opened" mean?

options.text: Open / Closed / Escalated / Archived — "Archived" means permanently closed
Pending / In Progress / Resolved / Re-Opened — "Re-Opened" means a previously resolved issue has recurred
New / Active / Complete / Cancelled — "Cancelled" means the issue was withdrawn
Pending / Escalated / Resolved / Closed — "Closed" means confirmed by management

questions.question: The Shiprocket wallet balance has reached zero. What is the correct action?

options.text: Continue processing orders — Shiprocket will invoice the difference later
Inform management immediately; do not process new orders until the wallet is recharged
Switch to a backup courier service until the wallet is topped up
Escalate to Shiprocket support to request a credit extension

questions.question: Which of the following is an item on the daily Shiprocket EOD checklist?

options.text: Send a summary email to the CRM Manager with all day's escalations
NDRs actioned within the 24-hour window
All Freshdesk tickets resolved and closed
Callback Request sheet cleared to zero
